title: Medicare levy questions M1-M2
description: How to complete the Medicare levy questions M1 and M2 in your paper tax return.

child_links.title: M1 Medicare levy reduction or exemption 2018
child_links.description: Complete question M1 to work out whether you qualify for a Medicare levy reduction or exemption.

child_links.title: M2 Medicare levy surcharge (MLS) 2018
child_links.description: Complete compulsory question M2 to determine whether you may have to pay the Medicare levy surcharge.
